product_overview: Intelli Sense is a customer lifecycle intelligence SPA that combines Retain Sense (churn prediction and root-cause explanations) and Obtain Sense (ICP, lead scoring and CAC×LTV analysis). The product surfaces prioritized retention actions and acquisition insights and lets teams import CSV data to feed models and reports.
core_goals: Authenticate and access the Intelli Sense workspace
See a single-cycle overview connecting acquisition (Obtain) and retention (Retain)
Identify and inspect customers at risk with model explanations (SHAP waterfall) and recommended retention actions
Score leads, inspect conversion drivers, and act on high-potential leads
Import CSV data for Retain and Obtain to update predictions and scoring
Configure tenant sector labels and segments so UI labels reflect the customer's business context

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate to the application with email and password to access the lifecycle workspace and module pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> Navigate to / -> See lifecycle overview
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in incorrect password -> Submit login form -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Lifecycle Overview (Intelli Sense Home)
features.description: View the high-level customer lifecycle summary that connects Obtain and Retain metrics, insights, and cross-module recommendations.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See Obtain and Retain summary metrics and ecosystem insight -> Inspect cross-module insight text -> Navigate to /obtain to inspect acquisition details
Navigate to / -> See Obtain and Retain summary metrics and ecosystem insight -> Navigate to /retain to inspect retention details

features.name: Retain Executive Dashboard
features.description: Explore retention KPIs, risk distribution, trending churn, revenue-at-risk, alerts and navigate to predictions for customer-level analysis.
user_flows: Navigate to /retain -> See top KPI MetricCards and main churn and risk charts -> Scroll to recent alerts and items -> Navigate to /retain/predictions to review probabilistic churn list

Navigate to /retain -> See risk distribution and alerts -> Navigate to /retain/predictions -> Filter by risk level -> Open a customer detail from the list -> See SHAP waterfall explanation and recommended retention action

features.name: Churn Predictions (customer list and detail)
features.description: List and filter customers ordered by churn probability, inspect model explanations in a detail drawer, and record recommended retention actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /retain/predictions -> Enter search term or apply risk/segment/status filters -> See filtered customer rows ordered by churn probability -> Export CSV of current view

Navigate to /retain/predictions -> Apply 'Critico' risk filter -> Select a high-risk row -> Open detail drawer -> See SHAP Waterfall showing factor contributions -> Record or schedule a retention action for the customer

features.name: Retain Data Upload and Column Mapping
features.description: Import customer CSVs to update Retain model inputs, map file columns to Retain dimensions, process the file and surface new predictions.
user_flows: Navigate to /retain/upload -> Select a CSV file -> Submit upload -> Map CSV columns to Retain dimensions using the mapper -> Confirm and process mapping -> See processing complete message -> Navigate to /retain/predictions -> See new predictions listed
Navigate to /retain/upload -> Select a CSV missing required columns -> Submit upload -> See validation error indicating missing required dimensions -> Map missing columns or cancel upload

features.name: Obtain Executive Dashboard
features.description: Review acquisition KPIs (CAC, LTV, funnel) and channel efficiency matrices to prioritize channels and campaigns.
user_flows: Navigate to /obtain -> See CAC, LTV and funnel charts and the CAC×LTV quadrant matrix -> Inspect funnel bottleneck insight -> Navigate to /obtain/leads to review scored leads
Navigate to /obtain -> See channel scatter plot and campaign points -> Use visual insight to identify campaigns to scale or pause

features.name: Lead Scoring and Lead Detail
features.description: Browse and filter scored leads, open lead detail drawers to view SHAP explanations and next-best-offer recommendations.
user_flows: Navigate to /obtain/leads -> Apply search, tier or campaign filters -> See leads ordered by score -> Export CSV of filtered leads
Navigate to /obtain/leads -> Filter to Hot leads -> Open a lead detail -> See SHAP Waterfall explaining score drivers -> Register a next-best-offer or sales action for the lead

features.name: Obtain Leads Upload and Mapping
features.description: Import lead CSVs, map columns to lead dimensions, trigger automatic scoring and surface imported leads in the lead scoring table.
user_flows: Navigate to /obtain/upload -> Select a CSV file of leads -> Submit upload -> Map CSV columns to Obtain dimensions (name, company, campaign, etc.) -> Confirm and process mapping -> See processing complete message -> Navigate to /obtain/leads -> See imported leads and applied scores
Navigate to /obtain/upload -> Select a CSV with missing lead email column -> Submit upload -> See validation error prompting to map or provide the required email column -> Provide mapping or cancel

features.name: Tenant Sector Configuration (Settings)
features.description: Edit tenant sector labels and segments so the UI labels (customer, revenue, engagement, segments, currency) reflect the tenant's business context.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Open the Setor tab -> Edit label fields and segments (customer label, revenue label, segments, currency) -> Save configuration -> See preview reflecting updated labels
Navigate to /settings -> Open the Usuarios tab -> View tenant users list -> Initiate an invite to add a new user

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Retain Sense Upload
features.description: Upload CSV for Retain ML processing

features.name: Obtain Sense Upload
features.description: Upload CSV for Obtain ML processing
